subprograms.name: From_Float
subprograms.code: function From_Float (Value : in Float) return Float

subprograms.name: From_Integer
subprograms.code: function From_Integer (Value : in Integer) return Float

generic_instantiations.name: Float_Conversion
generic_instantiations.code:
package Float_Conversion is
  new Conversion (Number_Types => Float_Number,
                  From_Integer => From_Integer,
                  From_Float   => From_Float);
